eligibility: Non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises needing up to Rs. 10 Lakh.
benefits: Collateral-free loans. Shishu (up to 50k), Kishore (50k-5L), Tarun (5L-10L).

eligibility: MSMEs looking to upgrade their machinery and technology.
benefits: 15% upfront capital subsidy for technology upgradation up to Rs. 1 crore.

eligibility: Any individual above 18 years. For manufacturing projects >10 lakh, minimum 8th pass required.
benefits: Margin money subsidy of up to 35% on projects costing up to Rs. 50 lakh (manufacturing) or Rs. 20 lakh (services).

scheme_name: Credit Guarantee Trust for Micro and Small Enterprises (CGTMSE)
eligibility: New and existing Micro and Small Enterprises.
benefits: Collateral-free credit up to Rs. 500 lakh with guarantee cover up to 85%.

eligibility: SC/ST and/or women entrepreneurs setting up a greenfield enterprise.
benefits: Bank loans between Rs. 10 lakh and Rs. 1 crore for setting up new enterprises.

eligibility: Traditional artisans and craftspeople involved in 18 specified trades.
benefits: Skill training, toolkit incentive of Rs. 15,000, and collateral-free credit up to Rs. 3 lakh at 5% interest.

eligibility: Any micro, small, or medium enterprise.
benefits: Protection against delayed payments, collateral-free loans, barcode registration subsidy, and ISO certification reimbursement.

scheme_name: Zero Defect Zero Effect (ZED) Certification Scheme
eligibility: All manufacturing MSMEs with Udyam Registration.
benefits: Financial assistance on cost of certification (up to 80% subsidy for Micro enterprises), promoting sustainable practices.

scheme_name: ASPIRE (Scheme for Promotion of Innovation, Rural Industries and Entrepreneurship)
eligibility: Any individual/entrepreneur aiming to set up rural and agriculture-based industries.
benefits: Establishment of Livelihood Business Incubators (LBI) and Technology Business Incubators (TBI) with financial support.

scheme_name: SFURTI (Scheme of Fund for Regeneration of Traditional Industries)
eligibility: Artisans, NGOs, institutions, and clusters involved in traditional industries (khadi, coir, village industries).
benefits: Financial assistance up to Rs. 5 crore for setting up common facility centers, training, and capacity building.

eligibility: All registered MSMEs, preferably forming a cluster of 4 to 10 units.
benefits: Financial assistance of up to 90% of the cost for implementing lean manufacturing techniques through consultants.

eligibility: Micro and small enterprises dealing with delayed payments from buyers.
benefits: Online platform to file applications regarding delayed payments. Buyers are liable to pay compound interest at three times the bank rate.

eligibility: SC/ST entrepreneurs holding MSME registration.
benefits: Subsidies for participation in exhibitions, vendor development programs, and reimbursement for NSIC/registration fees.

eligibility: Entrepreneurs, workers, and industries in the coir sector.
benefits: Skill development, market promotion, and modernizing coir processing units with financial assistance.

scheme_name: Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Scheme for MSMEs
eligibility: Manufacturing companies matching specific turnover and investment criteria in target sectors.
benefits: Financial incentives based on incremental sales of products manufactured in India.

eligibility: Startups recognized by DPIIT, incorporated less than 2 years ago.
benefits: Financial assistance up to Rs. 20 Lakhs for validation and Rs. 50 Lakhs for market entry/commercialization.

eligibility: Street vendors, hawkers, and small shopkeepers in urban/semi-urban areas.
benefits: Working capital collateral-free loan up to Rs. 10,000, 20,000, and 50,000 in progressive tranches.

eligibility: All manufacturing MSMEs.
benefits: Financial assistance up to Rs. 40 lakh for design projects and continuous design intervention.

eligibility: Registered Micro and Small Enterprises.
benefits: Assistance in raw material procurement, marketing support, and exemption from earnest money deposits.

scheme_name: TREAD (Trade Related Entrepreneurship Assistance and Development)
eligibility: Women entrepreneurs primarily from poor backgrounds/NGOs.
benefits: Government grant up to 30% of total project cost for capacity building and promoting entrepreneurship among women.

eligibility: Women artisans involved in the coir industry.
benefits: Provision of motorized ratts/equipment at 75% subsidy and monthly stipend during training.

eligibility: Khadi institutions and cooperatives.
benefits: 20% financial assistance (MDA) on production of Khadi and polyvastra to boost sales and marketing.

eligibility: Entrepreneurs setting up manufacturing bases in India.
benefits: Fast-tracked clearances, relaxed foreign direct investment (FDI) norms, and improved ease of doing business.

eligibility: MSMEs, students, and individual innovators.
benefits: Grant of up to Rs. 15 lakh per idea for developing and nurturing new innovative business concepts.

eligibility: Employers and new employees registered under EPFO.
benefits: Government covers both employee (12%) and employer (12%) EPF contributions for two years to boost employment.
